author: .paulharris
content:
I've raised a nimbus-EL PR to change it's code to `NE` and an execution api PR to reserve that key.
https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth1/pull/4447
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/848
I don't mind what the key is really, if someone from nimbus-EL wants an alternative. The main thing is it needs to be unique.

author: .paulharris
content: NM... its in the execution-apis list
